title: sphaeralcea rosea
intro: Sphaeralcea rosea, also known as the pink globemallow, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments, with medicinal properties attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing, and can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves. Sphaeralcea rosea is often used in traditional Native American medicine and is still valued for its medicinal and health benefits today.
